channel.title: Apeiron
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Apeiron

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Hermann Stefan Crüwell DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: The Matter at Hand: Prime Matter as an Unqualified Body in a Post-Hellenistic Pseudepigraphic Text
item.description: Article by Hermann Stefan Crüwell DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2024-0068

item.title: Plato, Republic Book II and Antiphon’s On Truth
item.description: Article by Hermann Stefan Crüwell DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2023-0107

item.title: The Issue of Diachronic Composition in Aristotelian Hylomorphism
item.description: Article by Hermann Stefan Crüwell DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2024-0058

item.title: Oikeion, Agathon, and Archaia Phusis in Plato’s Symposium
item.description: Article by Hermann Stefan Crüwell DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2022-0115
